subject: Fwd: Touch base AmC
body:
It is fine. The CEO of Reporty, Amir, may be in NY for meetings at that date. Barak may bring him as well.

On Feb 9, 2016, at 9:59 PM, Andrew McCormack  wrote:

> The Mark is fine.  My business partner, James, will be with me as well.
> 
> On Tue, Feb 9, 2016 at 2:50 PM, Nili Priell Barak  wrote:
>> Perfect. Does The Mark Hotel work for you?
>> thanks
>> Nili
>> On Feb 5, 2016, at 11:30 PM, Andrew McCormack  wrote:
>> 
>>> Does Tuesday, Feb 23 at 1pm ET work for you?
>>> 
>>> On Fri, Feb 5, 2016 at 8:38 AM, ehud barak  wrote:
>>>> Hi Andrew,
>>>> I’m in NY from Feb !5 to March 3. Ready to meet here.
>>>> best
>>>> EB
>>>> 
>>>> On Feb 5, 2016, at 4:43 AM, Andrew McCormack  wrote:
>>>> 
>>>> Ehud,
>>>> 
>>>> We'd love to hear more about Reporty, are you in NYC in the near term or
>>>> would a phone call make more sense?
>>>> 
>>>> Thanks for thinking of us Jeffrey.
>>>> 
>>>> A
>>>> 
>>>> On Feb 4, 2016, at 7:56 PM, jeffrey E.  wrote:
>>>> 
>>>> ehud barak   former defense minister of israel   has an interesting project
>>>> called Reporty,  ,   you might want to take a look,   ehud is copied on this
>>>> email
>>>> 
>>>> --
>>>>       please note
>>>> The information contained in this communication is
>>>> confidential, may be attorney-client privileged, may
>>>> constitute inside information, and is intended only for
>>>> the use of the addressee. It is the property of
>>>> JEE
>>>> Unauthorized use, disclosure or copying of this
>>>> communication or any part thereof is strictly prohibited
>>>> and may be unlawful. If you have received this
>>>> communication in error, please notify us immediately by
>>>> return e-mail or by e-mail to jeevacation@gmail.com, and
>>>> destroy this communication and all copies thereof,
>>>> including all attachments. copyright -all rights reserved
>>>> 
>>>> 
>>
